response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified it as an ending screen for the Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis 'Drawn to Dawn' concert.
2. Determined the song playing is the title track 'Drawn to Dawn' performed by the duo.
3. Used the official concert website (drawn-to-dawn.hololivepro.com) to locate the official lyrics.
4. Structured the findings into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video showing the ending screen of the Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina'nis 1st Concert 'Drawn to Dawn', featuring the concert's theme song.

scenes.description: The video displays a static image of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis with the concert title 'DRAWN TO DAWN'. The theme song plays in the background until the end of the video.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The land of my roots,
and the sun ablaze.
The colors of dawn
and a ray of light that shows the way.
I shine
bright for you.
A picture frame holding dreams,
and the waxing, waning moon.
Through the tranquil night,
a tender glow ripples upon the water.
Your light
is what makes me shine.
Two sparkles reflecting each other
melt into one,
and with it comes a dawn yet unseen.
As though to ink
the first lines of a
new story.
